generated_oml:
instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "A building infrastructure in the Architecture, Engineering, Construction, and Operations (AECO) domain, specifically demonstrated in a Living Lab case study, serving as a unified virtual representation for real-time monitoring, simulation, and life cycle-encompassing optimization of physical building operations."
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, OccupancySensor, EnvironmentalSensor, HVACActuator, LightingController
]

instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors providing operational data through automated data acquisition pipelines for real-time synchronization with the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors providing operational data through automated data acquisition pipelines for real-time synchronization with the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance EnvironmentalSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors providing operational data through automated data acquisition pipelines for real-time synchronization with the digital twin."
    DTDFVocab:producedData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance EnvironmentalDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom EnvironmentalSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature readings from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time occupancy data from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance EnvironmentalData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time environmental data from building sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData EnvironmentalDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHonoEnabler, EclipseDittoEnabler
]

instance BIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM models enriched with Building Control System (BCS) device semantics and middleware metadata (e.g., device IDs, endpoint addresses)"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMAuthoringToolEnabler, ModelDrivenFrameworkEnabler
]

instance EclipseHonoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance EclipseDittoEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService, SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, EnergyOptimizationService, VisualComfortManagementService, HealthEffectAnalysisService, Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualizationService
]

instance BIMAuthoringToolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM authoring tools for model creation and validation"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance ModelDrivenFrameworkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model-driven engineering frameworks for automated artifact generation from semantic BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, PredictiveAnalyticsService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building operations using sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides MonitoringInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Building simulation for operational analysis"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy, visual comfort, and health effects"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight, VisualComfortInsight, HealthEffectInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy consumption optimization using predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyOptimizationInsight
]

instance VisualComfortManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visual comfort management based on sensor data and BIM models"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualComfortInsight
]

instance HealthEffectAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Non-visual health effect analysis using predictive analytics"
    DTDFVocab:provides HealthEffectInsight
]

instance Interactive3DVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization using Unreal Engine 5 for facility management"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance MonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring data for building operations"
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Building simulation results for operational analysis"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for energy consumption optimization"
]

instance VisualComfortInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for visual comfort management"
]

instance HealthEffectInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Analysis of non-visual health effects"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization for facility management"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system actuators defined in BIM for Building Control Systems"
]

instance LightingController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting control system actuators defined in BIM"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the digital twin to adjust physical systems (e.g., lighting, HVAC) through bidirectional communication protocols using Eclipse Hono and Ditto, enabling closed-loop control of Building Control Systems (BCS)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with continuous data exchange for immediate updates between physical and virtual systems, ensuring immediate response to operational changes."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "An integrated system comprising BIM-based models, Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange, Unreal Engine 5 for visualization, and modular services with standardized extension points for scalable and interoperable digital twin deployment in AECO contexts."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all building life cycle stages from initial design through construction, operation, and refurbishment, enabling life cycle-encompassing optimization of building operations."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Evaluated using the Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric to ensure interoperability and architectural soundness, with mechanisms to address semantic drift through synchronization techniques between digital and physical counterparts."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for bidirectional real-time data exchange between physical assets and the digital twin, leveraging IoT protocols for secure and scalable communication."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards, Eclipse Hono and Ditto specifications, and standardized extension points for interoperable service integration across heterogeneous systems."
]
